title.en: This eternal kingdom of mankind is ready to rel...

content.en:
this day.

This eternal kingdom of mankind is ready to relocate to the realm of the gods.

This eternal kingdom is called the Terran Holy Kingdom, and it is also the core kingdom of the Endless Kingdoms Alliance.

Soon.

Ye Tian connected the realm of the realm of the realm of the realm of the god realm, and began to urge the eternal state decree to move the entire human race holy kingdom into the realm of the realm of the god realm.

"Here we go!"

Rumble!!!!!

The Eternal Decree released light to envelop the entire Terran Saint Kingdom, forming a layer of shield, and then the void cracked, forming a passage into the realm of the Realm God Kingdom.

Thundered!!!

The Terran Holy Kingdom soon moved into the realm of the Realm God Kingdom and disappeared.

At this time, those Terran Eternal Dao Realms who could not enter the realm of the Realm God Kingdom showed envious looks, and they also wanted to enter, but the quota was gone, so naturally they could not apply to enter.

However, they were not too disappointed, after all, the cultivation environment on the side of the Endless Realm Alliance was also okay, the number of Terran powerhouses was not much, but there were many Eternal Realms, and they were increasing all the time, and the cultivation speed would not be much slower.

......

The realm of the gods.

In the midst of the ruins, the Holy Kingdom of the Terran descended, occupied this area, and gradually integrated into this territory.

Soon after, the Terran Holy Kingdom was completely integrated here.

Subsequently, several Eternal Realm God Realm 167 of the Realm Court registered their basic information and then left.

From today onwards, the Holy Kingdom of the Human Race is an eternal kingdom of the realm of the Realm of God, and it is registered in the territory of the eternal realm of the realm of the realm of the Realm of God.

Of course, the Holy Kingdom of the Terran Race will not be blessed by the Realm Court or anything, at most, it can be regarded as entering the realm of the Realm God Kingdom, and there are just more opportunities, and in the future, they can wander in the realm of the Realm God Kingdom, seek opportunities, and so on.

At this time, many people in the Eternal Dao Realm were very curious about the Divine Realm Realm, and they all wanted to go out and wander for a while, but they were all stopped by Ye Tian.

The Eternal Dao Realm is not considered a strong person in the realm of the Divine Kingdom, it can only be regarded as a middle-level power, and it is easy to encounter danger.

Therefore, without understanding the situation, it is best to take a stroll around the neighborhood and not run too far, otherwise Ye Tian will not have time to rescue.

In the following days, Ye Tian mainly understood the situation in this area.

Through his constant exploration and the purchase of information from some eternal realms and forces, he gradually understood it clearly.

"Dongwu Realm!"

That's the name of the area.

There are more than 3,000 eternal realms in the Eastern Wu realm, but more than 300 eternal realms have been destroyed by the invasion of the demon seed before.

However, the Eastern Ukraine Realm is still strong.

Every Eternal Realm has an Eternal Realm Divine Realm, and it is conceivable how powerful the Dongwu Realm is, stronger than the entire Eternal Realm today, and even far beyond.

And the Dongwu Realm is not worth mentioning at all in the realm of the Realm God Kingdom, and it can't be ranked.

There are hundreds of Eternal Realms in the Realm of the Realm of the Gods, and each Eternal Realm has a large number of Eternal Realms, some of which have tens of thousands of Eternal Realms.

Of course.

The other Eternal Realms had little to do with Ye Tian, and Ye Tian was now mainly understanding the situation in the Eastern Wu Realm.

For example, the situation of the forces in the Eastern Ukraine Territory.

The Realm Court seems to control the entire Realm God Kingdom, but in fact it is only a loose organization, if the major forces are in a civil war, the Realm Court will not be able to control it, after all, the high-level of the Realm Court are the high-level of the major forces.

In other words, the Boundary Court is just a loose organization built by the major forces to manage the ordinary forces.

The Eastern Wu Realm has a total of sixteen top forces, more than a hundred powerful forces, and thousands of medium forces and dense small forces.

In the realm of the Realm God Kingdom, the status of the lord of the country is not high, even if he can completely control the eternal realm, it is useless, at most it will increase a little bit of combat power.

Like some great powers, they rule over many eternal kingdoms.

......

In an area not far from the Terran Holy Country, there is the headquarters of a medium power.

This middle power name (CGDF) is the old mountain of the sun.

The Old Sun Mountain has eighteen Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses, of which there are four Eternal Realm God Realm Initial Realm powerhouses, and the others are ordinary Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses, who have mastered an Eternal Realm under their command, but occupy a part of the territory in the other three Eternal Realms.

Therefore, the influence of the old mountain in the vicinity is still very strong.

At this time, the old mountain knew that another eternal kingdom had appeared nearby, and he was immediately ready to attack the idea of the Terran Holy Kingdom.

In the depths of the Old Sun Mountain, four Eternal Realm God Realm junior powerhouses were starting a meeting.

"The last Demon Seed Abyss invasion, three Eternal Realms were destroyed nearby, and one medium force was destroyed, and we were lucky enough to avoid the crisis. And just now, an eternal kingdom has moved up from the eternal border, and we are a medium power nearby, and this is a good opportunity to occupy this eternal kingdom. "

"With the strength of our old mountains, the other party should be subservient to us, right?"

"These Eternal Realms that have relocated from the Eternal Realm are all very arrogant, after all, they are used to being arrogant in the Eternal Realm, and they may not necessarily submit to us, so what should we do?"

"Kill, no, destroying the eternal kingdom is a great sin, and the realm court will not leave it alone. On the surface, we can't kill the other members of the Realm, if we are the top power, we can ignore this problem, but we are only a medium force. "

"If you don't agree, then suppress it, and let some of them disappear at will, and if it goes on for a long time, those Eternal Dao realms in the Eternal Realm will run out, and there will only be an empty shell of the Eternal Realm. Moreover, if the Eternal Realm God Realm of that Eternal Realm dares to leave his Eternal Realm and make the other party disappear with a little means, it will not be easy for the Realm Court to find out. "

"Then do it, who will go to that eternal kingdom?"

"I'll go!"

"Ice Sun Realm God, then it's up to you, with your strength, it must be easy to deal with an Eternal Realm God Realm who has just come from the Eternal Realm Realm. "

......

Subsequently, the Ice Sun Realm God traveled from the Old Sun Mountain to the Terran Holy Country.

The Old Sun Mountain was not far from the Terran Holy Country, and it was not long before they arrived here.

"There are a lot of Eternal Dao realms, and the strength of this Eternal Realm is okay!"

The Ice Sun Realm God said darkly.

And just when the Ice Sun Realm God approached the capital of the Terran Holy Kingdom, Ye Tian discovered him.

"An Eternal Realm God Realm beginner powerhouse, it shouldn't be sent by the Realm Court, otherwise he will contact me first!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Immediately, he shuttled over and intercepted the other party.
